pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-011 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.428, highest: NICE at 0.428). Core signal: 2, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. Security and Privacy at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for AI/ML Specialist (DoD).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.428, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Challenge exclusion of SP KSA for DoD AI/ML Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Security competencies with DoD/ML signals and no OOS are market-supported in defense context.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion overturned. Security competencies with DoD/ML signals and no OOS are market-supported in defense context. Final decision: include.
